resourceId.description: ID of the changed resource (secret key, environment ID, etc.).

projectId.description: Project ID. Null for tenant-level events.

environmentId.description: Environment ID. Null for project-level events.

key.description: Secret key name. Only set for secret.* events.

BellaEventData.description: The data payload inside a BellaWebhookPayload.

id.description: Unique delivery ID. Use for idempotency (format: whevt_xxx).

tenantId.description: The tenant that owns the resource.

BellaWebhookPayload.description: The JSON payload delivered to your webhook endpoint by Bella Baxter. Validate with X-Bella-Signature header using HMAC-SHA256.
